title: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) — Intrinsic Value & Prospect Score
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Abbott Laboratories using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what ABT is really worth. Economic Prospect Score: 66/100 — Moderate Prospect.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
">
Abbott is a diversified healthcare leader. While COVID testing revenues have evaporated, its medical devices (like FreeStyle Libre) continue to grow impressively. An 8% FCF growth assumption models stable, low-double-digit medical device growth blended with mature pharma and nutritional segments.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).

faq.question: Why use an 8.5% discount rate?
faq.answer: Westmount Research. "Abbott Laboratories (ABT) Intrinsic Value: A DCF Analysis." westmountfundamentals.com, March 18, 2026.

prospectVerdictDetail: Diversified medtech/diagnostics company. FreeStyle Libre CGM is the growth star. Post-COVID diagnostics revenue normalization creates tough comps.
prospectKeyRisks: FreeStyle Libre growth decelerating as diabetes CGM market matures
Nutrition segment recovering slowly from Sturgis plant issues
prospectKeyCatalysts: Libre 3 with continuous ketone monitoring expanding TAM beyond diabetes to weight management
Structural heart devices growing 15%+ in a large addressable market
Medical device innovation pipeline across multiple high-growth categories
prospectMethodology: Score is based on three pillars: Competitive Momentum (0-35), Moat Durability (0-35), and Sentiment & Catalysts (0-30), totaling 0-100. Each pillar is broken into individually scored factors with transparent rationale. Data sources include FY2025 10-K filings, analyst consensus estimates, news sentiment analysis, and competitive landscape assessment. The score is forward-looking and represents economic prospect over a 2-3 year horizon.
